opportunity.name: Global AI Hackathon Series with Qwen Cloud
notes: Blog Post Award is not standalone; it requires a qualified Devpost project submission.

qwen_plan.strategy: Prepare a qualified project submission, then use a public blog post to target the multi-winner blog award.
approval_checkpoints: Confirm eligibility for the target event and prize.
Confirm before creating accounts, joining hackathons, publishing repos, posting videos/blogs, or submitting forms.
Do not store passwords, OTPs, API keys, payment, tax, KYC, or recovery data.
Capture live cloud deployment proof only after the deployment exists and can be public.
Publish the blog/social post only after the user approves the public URL and wording.
notes: Blog Post Award is not standalone; it requires a qualified Devpost project submission.

opportunity.name: Mind the Product World Product Day
human_blockers: Novus email verification and password creation
Novus connection or installation before submission
notes: Registered on Devpost as OOYXLOO on 2026-06-10.
Novus free account signup was started with the user's authorized email, but the official email verification link must be completed by the user.
PrizePilot is a fit if positioned as a shipped product for builders under prize/deadline pressure, with Novus observing route triage and blocker-resolution flows.

mindtheproduct_plan.strategy: Ship a narrow product workflow, instrument it with the required analytics tool, and use the data trail as judging evidence.

Confirm before creating accounts, joining hackathons, publishing repos, posting videos/blogs, or submitting forms.
Do not store passwords, OTPs, API keys, payment, tax, KYC, or recovery data.
Install or connect product analytics only after the official account is verified, and record the public proof without storing credentials.

agent_walkthrough.responsibility: Normalize prize pages into comparable opportunity records.

agent_walkthrough.responsibility: Compare the route against public winning-project patterns.
agent_walkthrough.output: Differentiators that judges can understand in under five minutes.

agent_walkthrough.responsibility: Choose the most reachable target instead of chasing the largest headline pool.

agent_walkthrough.responsibility: Hold account, billing, public posting, payout, tax, and KYC actions for human control.
agent_walkthrough.output: Approval queue and evidence gap register.

judge_scorecard.proof: Autopilot for prize-route execution plus verified live Qwen refinement.

judge_scorecard.proof: Deterministic planner, Qwen-compatible client, HTTP API, Docker, Alibaba manifest.

judge_scorecard.proof: Turns a real money-seeking workflow into auditable actions and evidence gates.

approval_queue.status: completed once; future runs stay human-gated

evidence_gaps: Qwen/DashScope live refinement is verified with a runtime key and no stored secret.
Alibaba Cloud Function Compute manifest exists, but no live endpoint has been verified.
integrity_boundary: No API key is stored in the deployed app.
Public repository, video, blog post, and Devpost submission are recorded only after verification.
Live Qwen Cloud usage is captured as non-sensitive proof; Alibaba Cloud endpoint proof must still be captured before that claim is strengthened.
Novus is not claimed as installed until the official Novus account is verified and connected.
